title: Inline comments silently dropped — reviews post as body-only
description: The bot successfully posts a review body but no inline diff annotations appear. All inline comments are aggregated into the top-level review body instead of being anchored to diff lines. Observed when reviewing the mcp-exec CC plugin PR.
notes:
ROOT CAUSE ANALYSIS:

1. Prompt conflict (prompt.ts:106): says 'omit start_line' but strict JSON schema *requires* it present. The model may set start_line: 0 instead of null. When start_line=0, validLines.has(0) is false → comment filtered.

2. No filtering visibility: buildReviewComments silently drops comments with no logging. Cannot diagnose which comments are dropped or why.

3. No GitHub API error recovery: if API rejects inline comments (e.g., invalid position format), no retry path exists.

FIXES PLANNED:
- prompt.ts: change 'omit start_line' to 'set start_line to null'
- review.ts: add console.log in buildReviewComments showing drop reason per comment
- review.ts: log model output and post-filter counts in buildReview
- github-app.ts: catch review POST failure, retry with body-only as fallback

title: Add custom domain joeblack.nyc to GitHub Pages
description:
Configure DNS on Porkbun and set custom domain in GitHub Pages settings for codex-review-bot. Research and integrate a Porkbun MCP server or Claude Code plugin for DNS automation if available.

## Context
Domain: joeblack.nyc, Registrar: Porkbun. Target: GitHub Pages for joeblackwaslike/codex-review-bot. Currently using default joeblackwaslike.github.io/codex-review-bot URL. A Porkbun MCP server would allow managing DNS records directly from Claude Code.
notes:
Porkbun MCP options found (all 2026, active):
1. major/porkbun-mcp (PyPI, RECOMMENDED) — uvx porkbun-mcp, Python >=3.13, widest coverage, explicit Claude Code setup docs, read-only by default + --get-muddy for writes. https://github.com/major/porkbun-mcp
2. korobkov-v/porkbun-mcp (npm) — npx -y porkbun-mcp, adds composite tools (dns_upsert, domain_cutover_web). https://github.com/korobkov-v/porkbun-mcp
3. keyserfaty/mcp-porkbun (Python, no PyPI) — domain purchasing focus
4. flntfnd/porkbun-mcp (Node, macOS Keychain) — Claude Code focused setup script
5. myroslavtryhubets/porkbun-mcp (Python, HTTP transport)
Recommended path: install major/porkbun-mcp, add to ~/.claude/settings.json, then use dns_upsert to point joeblack.nyc -> GitHub Pages IPs + set CNAME.
